channel.title: Posts on viduqlog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on viduqlog

item.title: Blog init
item.description: You are reading the first post of my blog. It is my second attempt to start a blog. With this blog, I also try to avoid using twitter. The Latin proverb “Verba volant, scripta manent” means “spoken words fly away, written words remain”. Tweeting feels like speaking somehow. Let’s see if this feels more like writing.
